title: turnera setifera
intro: Turnera setifera, also known as Damiana, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae, native to the Americas. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Turnera setifera include relieving stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing libido, as well as providing potential relief from symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Turnera setifera include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used as dietary supplements to support overall health and well-being.
